venues.name: The Restaurant
venues.description: Main dining room with open-seating dinner service. Menu changes daily with classic and contemporary dishes; complimentary caviar available on request.

venues.name: The Colonnade
venues.description: Casual indoor/outdoor dining with buffet breakfast and lunch, plus themed dinner nights featuring regional cuisines. Full table service at dinner.

venues.name: The Patio
venues.description: Outdoor deck grill serving casual lunches, poolside snacks, burgers, salads, and light bites throughout the afternoon.

venues.name: Seabourn Square
venues.description: Complimentary café at the heart of the ship serving coffee, espresso, pastries, sandwiches, and light snacks throughout the day.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Full menu available for in-suite dining 24 hours a day, complimentary. Includes the full Restaurant menu during dinner hours.

venues.name: Restaurant 2
venues.description: Intimate reservation-only specialty restaurant with innovative tasting menus prepared tableside. Complimentary; advanced reservations recommended.

venues.name: Earth & Ocean
venues.description: Relaxed outdoor terrace dining at lunch and dinner featuring grilled meats, fresh salads, and seasonal dishes in an open-air setting.
